message:
fix: Add style="display:none" defense to graph detail pane

Ensures the detail pane is hidden before Alpine.js initializes,
preventing any flash of content on page load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2956,6 +2956,7 @@ <h5 class="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase trac
       <!-- Detail Pane - Bottom sheet on mobile (60% height), side panel on desktop -->
       <!-- Mobile: swipe down to dismiss; Desktop: swipe right to dismiss -->
       <div x-show="graphDetailNode"
+           style="display: none"
            x-data="{ touchStartY: 0, touchStartX: 0, touchCurrentY: 0, touchCurrentX: 0, swiping: false, isMobile: window.innerWidth < 768 }"
            x-init="window.addEventListener('resize', () => isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768)"
            x-transition:enter="transition ease-out duration-300"
